description_long: This is a modern, tactical machine gun with a matte black finish and a robust, angular design. It features a large, boxy upper receiver with an integrated advanced optic or targeting module mounted on top, suggesting use in high-tech or military scenarios. The weapon is equipped with a standard cylindrical barrel, visible muzzle flash, and ejected shell casings, indicating it is actively firing. The stock is solid and ergonomic, likely made from polymer, providing stability and comfort for the user. A detachable box magazine is inserted into the lower receiver, and the grip is textured for secure handling. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, designed for durability and reliability in urban combat environments.
description: A modern, matte black tactical machine gun with a boxy upper receiver, advanced optic, and detachable box magazine. It features a solid ergonomic stock and is shown actively firing with visible muzzle flash and ejected casings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the machine gun, including the advanced optic, solid stock, box magazine, and visible muzzle flash.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle flash, barrel alignment, and the compact width of the weapon; ejected casings are visible to the side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the advanced optic, stock, and ejected shell casings in mid-air.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, grip, and the back of the optic module, with the barrel and muzzle flash visible at the far end.
attribute_stock_design: fixed polymer stock with ergonomic contour
